Welcome to My Cybersecurity Blog

This blog is dedicated to Statistics and Cybersecurity.

Here you will find homework, projects, articles, and insights on cybersecurity topics.

-–

Homework Assignments

Select Homework:

  • Homework 1 – Statistics and Its Role in Cybersecurity
  • Homework 2 – Decoding Language: Exploring Algorithms and Frequency Distributions
  • Homework 3 – RSA (toy) — Letter-level encryption and statistical recovery
  • Homework 4 – Law of Large Numbers — Simulation and Visualization
  • Homework 5 – Measures of Location and Dispersion
  • Homework 6 – Mean and Variance Simulator - Numerical Stability and Algorithm Comparison
  • Homework 7 – Random Walk \& Binomial Convergence
  • Homework 8 – Bernoulli process, LLN, Pascal \& Fibonacci
  • Homework 9 – Foundations of Probability Theory
  • Homework 10 – Simulating a Counting Process
  • Homework 11 – Wiener Process: Interactive Simulators, Scale Tests, and Statistical Diagnostics
